name: Bloodroot Shield
description:
This wooden shield is an interwoven knot of still-living tree roots (Hardness 6, HP 36, BT 18).

Activate—Thirsty Roots 1 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You hold out the shield as the roots untangle themselves and launch forward, dealing ] damage to all creatures in a ( save). On a failed save, a creature takes an additional ] damage. The shield regains a number of Hit Points equal to half the void damage dealt.
